tasks.title: Identify redundant documentation file in project
tasks.description: Search the project directory for documentation files and identify the redundant one that should be removed. Confirm the file path and name for deletion.
acceptanceCriteria: The redundant documentation file is identified with exact path
tasks.expectedResult: The redundant documentation file is located and its path is known for removal

evidence: command output lists the redundant doc file
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the exact file path for the redundant doc file to be removed

tasks.title: Delete the identified redundant documentation file
tasks.description: Delete the redundant documentation file identified in the previous task from the project directory to remove redundancy.
acceptanceCriteria: The redundant documentation file no longer exists in the project directory
tasks.expectedResult: The redundant documentation file is deleted and no longer present in the project

outputPlan.description: Redundant documentation file removed from project

metadata.inputContext: Path of redundant documentation file from previous task
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Removes redundant documentation file to clean project files
